methodology.priceDefinition: fixed-horizon endpoint return, CAGR for periods longer than one year, and maximum drawdown
methodology.rateDefinition: absolute and percentage-point change between fixed-horizon endpoints
methodology.flowDefinition: absolute and relative percentage change between fixed-horizon endpoints
methodology.cagrDefinition: annualized by actual elapsed days; price series only
methodology.maxDrawdownDefinition: largest peak-to-trough percentage in the eligible fixed horizon; price series only
